---
title: "Functional Enrichment of Progression Transcriptomic Features"
author: 
  - "Jaime Ñíguez"
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd  
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.11.2
  kernelspec:
    display_name: R
    language: R
    name: ir
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---
